issues.description: Card has non-empty effect text but empty effects array. Should contain a conditional power boost effect triggered on play or start of turn.
Missing trigger type. This appears to be a static ability that should trigger OnPlay or be evaluated at game start.
Missing conditions: LeaderHasType (FILM) and a condition checking for 6+ rested cards (no standard condition exists; may require custom logic or TrashCount workaround).

conditions.description: 6 or more rested cards in play
